ddls:
CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "hall_ticket_no" TEXT /* Hall ticket number assigned to the candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "father_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate's father */,
  "community" TEXT /* Community classification of the candidate */,
  "ex_servicemen" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candidate is an ex-serviceman */,
  "local_district" TEXT /* Local district affiliation of the candidate */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the candidate */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the candidate applied */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candidate's details have been verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_community FOREIGN KEY ("community") REFERENCES communities ("community_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam result entry */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate who took the examination */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the examination conducted */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject for which the marks are recorded */,
  "marks" REAL /* Marks obtained by the candidate in the examination */,
  "max_marks" REAL /* Maximum marks possible for the subject */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank achieved by the candidate based on marks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES examinations ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "examinations" (
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each examination */,
  "exam_name" TEXT /* Name of the examination conducted */,
  "exam_type" TEXT /* Type of the examination (e.g., entrance, final) */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date on which the examination was conducted */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the examination in minutes */,
  "total_candidates" INTEGER /* Total number of candidates who appeared for the examination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communities" (
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community */,
  "community_name" TEXT /* Name of the community (e.g., OC, SC, BC-A) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description regarding the community classification */,
  "reservation_percentage" REAL /* Reservation percentage for the community */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ex_servicemen" (
  "ex_serviceman_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ex-serviceman record */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate who is an ex-serviceman */,
  "service_details" TEXT /* Details regarding the military service of the candidate */,
  "service_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the military service */,
  "service_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the military service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ex_serviceman_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ex_servicemen_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)
